zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross於大約1570年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，他的父親Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail31歲，母親Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluag27歲。他於1595年之前與Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1650年3月享年81歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross was born about 1570, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail, was 31 and his mother, Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluag, was 27. He married Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie before 1595. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in March 1650, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross est né environ 1570, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluag, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie avant 1595. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en mars 1650, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross um 1570 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail 31 und seine Mutter Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluag 27. Er hat vor 1595 Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im März 1650 im Alter von 81 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross è nato il circa 1570 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluag, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie prima del 1595. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1650, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecrossが約1570年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintailは31歳，母Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluagは27歳であった。1595年以前にMirabell Annabelle Mackenzieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1650年3月に81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross(이)가 대략 1570년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluag(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1595년 이전 Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1650년 3월 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross nasceu aproximadamente 1570, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluag, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie antes 1595. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em março de 1650, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross родился около 1570 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Mackenzie of Davochmaluag, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie перед 1595 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер марта 1650 г. в возрасте 81 год.

Se casó con Mirabell Annabelle Mackenzie antes de 1595. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1650, a la edad de 81 años.
